questions: Does the patient have persistent vomiting, diarrhea, and/or abdominal distension? (Yes/No)
What is the susceptibility profile of the organism? (Fully Susceptible, Multidrug-Resistant, Nalidixic Acid–Resistant, Unknown)
Does the patient have any known allergies to antibiotics? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have G6PD deficiency? (Yes/No)
